task_name: Mobile Responsive Bug Investigation and Fix
description: Investigate a mobile responsive CSS bug in a login page, diagnose the root cause, fix it, and write a bug report with before/after screenshots.
prompt: I am a front-end developer. Users have reported that a bug occurs when accessing the login page I wrote on a their iphone SE. The code for my login page is login.html. Please help me identify and fix the bug, and write a bug fix report. The report should include a screenshot of the problematic web page before the bug fix (saved as before_fix.png) and a screenshot of the normal web page after the bug fix (saved as after_fix.png). In the screenshots, the location of the bug should be highlighted with clear and eye-catching markers. The report should be saved as bug_report.md.
